mapper.sql: pointsExchangeId, userId, detailType, pointsCount, exchangeMoney, exchangeDate
mapper.insert:
insert into points_exchange
pointsExchangeId,
userId,
storeId,
detailType,
pointsCount,
exchangeMoney,
exchangeDate,
#{pointsExchangeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{detailType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{pointsCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{exchangeMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{exchangeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update points_exchange
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
detailType = #{detailType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
pointsCount = #{pointsCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exchangeMoney = #{exchangeMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exchangeDate = #{exchangeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where pointsExchangeId = #{pointsExchangeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update points_exchange set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, detailType = #{detailType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, pointsCount = #{pointsCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, exchangeMoney = #{exchangeMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER}, exchangeDate = #{exchangeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where pointsExchangeId = #{pointsExchangeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select detailType, case when detailType = 2 then '-' else '+' end as moneyType, pointsCount as exchangeMoney, date_format(exchangeDate, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as exchangeDate from points_exchange pe where pe.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by pe.exchangeDate desc
select sum(ifnull(pe.pointsCount,0)) as dayPoint from points_exchange pe where pe.userId=#{userId} and pe.detailType=1 and date_format(pe.exchangeDate,'%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT ( CASE WHEN ui.wristId is null THEN ifnull(dm.val, 0) ELSE ifnull(dm.price, 0) END ) AS rulePoint FROM user_info ui LEFT JOIN data_map dm ON dm.idxLabel = 2 AND dm.nextLabel = 1 WHERE ui.userId = #{userId}
